sections: HCM-1.4 — Profile-aware setup and doctor decisions
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
reviewed dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 4 of the exact thirteen-file thrice-remediated HCM-1.4 planning subject. Reviews 1-3 returned six, four, and two Required findings; the parent remediated every complete round in docs only. Review 3 accepted all earlier remedies and found only an unreachable invalid-root replacement plus incomplete SetupError payload bindings. The current subject removes invalid-root repair in favor of fail-closed typed errors and freezes one total error kind/reason/path table with no instance/string inference. All three predecessor dispatches and four proof/remediation walls are manifested. Independently derive the complete final verdict; inherit no conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted thirteen-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, all four proof/remediation walls, and all three predecessor immutable dispatches.

Read unchanged control-pack authority, landed HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 source/tests/records, live setup/doctor/route-state/author/CLI/profile/condition/registry code, Cargo manifests, package proof, CI, and official dependency docs only as needed.

Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, API compile-feasibility, setup error-table, inspection status/reason, exact allowlist, TDD-ordering, author-regression, package/source-tree, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.

No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, production authoring, reset repair, condition evidence/evaluator, compiler publication, CI, canonical content, HCM-2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.

Do not infer an unspecified evidence producer, API field/type, error precedence, inspection pair, compatibility bridge, reset transaction, publication change, platform proof, final HCM-4 DTO, content authority, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat either parent remediation or predecessor review as approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact thirteen-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.

Re-verify every Review 1 remedy: current status/selector, condition-definition-only unknown narrowing and absent evidence API, honest unchanged reset owner, exact decision/inspection/compiler API seam, compiler source-tree substitute, and actual Windows runtime stop gate.

Re-verify every Review 2 remedy: exact two author-test helper exceptions and 47/22 baselines; total SetupMode/request/root/flag/rewrite/error/wire behavior; total low-level inspection status/reason table; full allowlist/regression feasibility.

Re-verify Review 3 root remedy: Preserve/Create are the only root actions; missing/directory routing is total; non-directory/symlink init/auto and refresh fail closed before inspection/mutation; no invalid-root removal/repair branch or stale retained-behavior claim survives.

Re-verify Review 3 error remedy: SetupError has no ungrounded instance field; every constructible kind/reason maps to exactly None, .handbook, or .handbook/state; runtime errors parse/disclose no legacy string/child/absolute path; no pair or input is missing.

Review every engine/compiler code block and algorithm for exact trait/type/ownership/visibility/error/serialization/mutation feasibility against live source, including shipped/default and injected custom seams.

Verify setup/doctor consume one closure, fixed decisions leave only those production seams, inspection remains structural/no-follow/bounded, setup writes no artifact, root/reset/rewrites are safe and total, and CLI owns wording/JSON/exit.

Verify exact existing/new allowlists, genuine RED-before-production order, author helper diff ceiling, all focused/sibling/workspace/package/source-tree/actual-Windows/security/determinism/scope gates, and two-commit closeout are complete and feasible.

Verify classification ceiling, condition/evaluator/content/reset/publication/later gates stay open, todo is unchecked, current mutations are docs-only, lineage is honest, and no HCM-2 activation occurs.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, API fields, request/error precedence, inspection pairs, authoring behavior, compatibility, reset transaction, publication, platform proof, content authority, or later-slice decisions.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
